title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates building a Jira adapter for Archon, an AI system that automates coding workflows. The adapter enables tickets to trigger AI-driven bug fixes and pull request generation with status updates posted back to Jira.
